intentSynonyms: list an issue history in linear
show me my issue history in linear
view my issue history in linear
see all my issue history in linear
list issue change history in linear
description: List the change history (state changes, assignee changes, priority changes) for a Linear issue.

issue_id.description: Issue UUID to list history for

limit.description: Maximum number of entries to return (default 25, max 50)

after.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response
